potential_hallucinations.requirement: The system shall allow individual counsellors to maintain contact with all individual students and their parents.
The system shall simplify the process and minimize manual paperwork.
The system shall automate the manual process, converting it into a fully computerized system.
The system shall design and implement a system for rationalizing admissions to specific courses within universities or institutions.
The system shall provide students with information about colleges and universities where they can apply, based on their qualifications.
The system shall provide students with information about available seats within the institution, including booked and vacant seats.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: The system shall allow individual counsellors to maintain contact with all individual students and their parents.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall enable real-time communication between counsellors, students, and parents.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: A student can also get the information regarding how many seats have been booked and vacant seats available in the institution (Figures 29.1–29.8).
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall provide students with real-time updates on seat availability, including booked and vacant seats.

hallucinations.rewritten_requirement: The system shall automate the manual process, converting it into a fully computerized system.
hallucinations.reason: This requirement is not supported by any evidence in the source text. The original text only mentions 'smoothening' and 'making complete atomization of manual process to computerized system', which does not imply full automation.

hallucinations.rewritten_requirement: The system shall publish the results of counselling services and other relevant information.
hallucinations.reason: This requirement is not supported by any evidence in the source text. The original text only mentions 'publishing results'.

duplicates.requirement_a: The system shall simplify the process and minimize manual paperwork.
duplicates.requirement_b: The system shall automate the manual process, converting it into a fully computerized system.
duplicates.reason: These two requirements are similar in meaning and can be combined into one requirement.

ambiguities.rewritten_requirement: The system shall enable students to register for counselling services if they meet the eligibility criteria.
ambiguities.reason: This requirement is ambiguous because it does not specify what 'eligibility criteria' means. It could be related to academic performance, financial status, or other factors.

Source text:
<<<
The first phase of a person’s life is confined mainly by education and training. Hence, counselling is an important aspect for the students of the current technological generation as an individual counsellor may remain in contact with all individual students as well as parents. Student
Counselling Management System will simplify the process and reduce the manual paperwork.
It is used to smoothen the work of each counsellor who is facing problems currently, and making complete atomization of manual process to computerized system. The main objective of the
Student Counselling Management System is to design a system to rationalize the admission to
particular courses in a university/institution. Through this system, the student will be able to
register for counselling if he is eligible. If the student is qualifying the criteria then he will get the
information regarding the colleges and the universities in which he can apply. The main features
are online admission, report generation based on student’s merit list and keeping track of counselling procedures and finally publishing results. A student can also get the information regarding
how many seats have been booked and vacant seats available in the institution (Figures 29.1–29.8).
>>>
